flow_rollout_diagnostics.description: Displacement distribution, endpoint consistency, stepwise trend

generation_layers_analysis.description: Raw, repaired, and reranked layer deltas

independent_diagnostics.description: Histogram of coordinate displacements across rollout steps
independent_diagnostics.purpose: Show flow trajectories remain within chemical validity envelope

independent_diagnostics.description: Per-step validity progression (atoms, clash, pocket fit)

independent_diagnostics.purpose: Confirm gated interaction remains active (not collapsed)
Verify slots engaged and not sparse-collapsed
Quantify flow matching advantage over baseline

consistency_requirements: ✓ Flow beats denoising on >=1 primary metric
At least 5 independent diagnostics present and mutually consistent
summary: Comprehensive flow diagnostics establish mechanistic confidence. Trajectory stability, gate/slot utilization, stepwise trends, and efficiency comparison create multi-angle evidence portfolio supporting flow matching claims.
